data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by minimizing options on each page.
data.technical_spec: Navigation design with limited options per menu.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interactive elements are sized for easy use across device interfaces.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design patterns conform to users' expectations based on experiences elsewhere.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI patterns, familiar navigation structures.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content is organized in chunks to improve cognitive processing.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Complexity is reduced cognitively by offloading to the system.
